query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a bright red rain poncho rides a bicycle along a wet road beside a body of water, with autumn-colored trees visible in the background and an overcast sky above.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred photograph shows a person in a vivid red rain poncho riding a bicycle along a wet road next to water, where extreme blur streaks the autumn foliage and sky into horizontal smears, overexposed light washes out the upper sky into near-white abstraction, and the overall effect conveys a sense of rushing, anxious movement through dreary weather.
